replacements.new: // We no longer need the "miscserver" or "sendAt" strings, directly pass the raw AT command

replacements.new: // Android 14+ (API > 33): Use the new IToolControl interface

Usage:

  ufi_req -host 192.168.1.1 -pass 123456 -X GET  -e "/api/AT?command=AT&slot=0"

Parameters:
`)
